text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text:
And that concludes our first lesson of the new
year. I look forward to spending a productive
year with everyone.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Happy New Year, Hayahideee! Let's make it a
great one!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Happy New Year, Ticket. How many times
do you plan to say that, though? This is already
your third time.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Really? Are you sure?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Well, that's okay! Hey, which crown are you
gunning for this year?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
The Classic Triple Crown? The Triple Tiara? I
chose—

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Let me guess. You chose the Classic Triple Crown
tour because it has the Japanese Derby, right?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: No way! How'd you know?! That's exactly right! Running in the Derby's my dream!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
The Japanese Derby is SO awesome! I remember
how wild the crowd went when I watched it with
my mom as a kid!

text_block_list.name: Spectator
text_block_list.text: Sniffle...

text_block_list.name: Young Ticket
text_block_list.text: What's wrong? Does your tummy hurt?!

text_block_list.name: Spectator
text_block_list.text: Sniff. It's not that. I'm just—hic!—so happy she won!

text_block_list.name: Spectator
text_block_list.text:
My dream has always been to see her win the
Derby!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... Sob... The Derby is filled with so many dreams...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I swear, she must've told that story a million times
already.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Haha, well, that's how important it is to her.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I swear—one day, I'll be the Derby Champiooon!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. You should wipe your nose, Ticket. Do you
have any tissues on you?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Anyway, what tour did you choose, Hayahide?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: The Classic Triple Crown, of course.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh. Then all three of us chose the same one...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Whoa!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Taishin, are you okay?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...I'm fine. I just tripped.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Are you sure? You didn't skip breakfast again,
did you? If you're not feeling well—

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I said I'm fine. And I had breakfast, okay? I really
wish you'd stop already.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I know—you saw me trip and got worried. I get it,
but I just... I don't wanna hear it anymore.

text_block_list.name: Woman
text_block_list.text:
Are you sure you're cut out for racing? Maybe
you should reconsider. I don't think you have the
constitution for it...

text_block_list.name: Elementary School Classmate A
text_block_list.text:
Huh? You're seriously planning to go to Tracen
Academy? You can't be for real. I doubt they'd
let a runt like you enter the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Elementary School Classmate B
text_block_list.text:
Keep dreaming, shorty. Not like anything you try
will turn out good anyway.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to win. Even if I have to go up against
both of you, I'm going to win the Classic Triple
Crown.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Otherwise, there's no point. I have to win and
make my haters eat their words.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I understand, Taishin. I wouldn't expect anything
less from you.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
But I don't intend to lose either. No matter if I
race against you or Ticket, I won't hold back.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Good. It'll be more satisfying when I beat you,
then. See you at the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I'm looking forward to it.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Come to think of it, this is our first meeting this
year, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Happy New Year to you too.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Now, getting down to business... My goals haven't
changed.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I still plan on becoming a racer whom no one can
beat. I'm going to become the greatest
Umamusume of all time.
choice_data_list:
I assume winning against Brian is also one of
your goals?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
That's right—which is why I want to finalize my
winning equation as quickly as possible.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
What do you think is lacking from my equation at
the moment?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Heh, you're right.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Then let's get started with our meeting. That's
why we're here in the first place.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: We can test things out in practice afterwards.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I share a spirited discussion with Biwa Hayahide
about racing.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Ah, good point. Food is not only essential for
maintaining health, it's also important for
moderating stress.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I should have a banana parfait once in a
while...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Um, well... I mean, I like other things too. Like
banana cake...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Anyway, stop distracting me from our real topic!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having finished our first meeting of the year,
Biwa Hayahide and I treat ourselves to a banana
parfait.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Technique? Interesting...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Let's start by gathering the data we need.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
We'll look at the Classic winners from the past ten
years and see if we can identify any trends.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: You're absolutely right. That's not enough, is it? Let's go through twenty years' worth of data.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I wish I'd kept my mouth shut, but still, it's a
productive use of time.
